_README: Optional account registry. Copy to .claude/accounts.json in your project root (NOT in this skill folder), so you can refer to accounts by name/alias instead of a 10-digit ID. The real file is gitignored — keep client IDs out of version control. Keys starting with _ are ignored (documentation only). All values below are placeholders.

_fields.name: Human-readable account name, shown in --list-accounts. Can be used to select the account (--account="Example Client One").
_fields.id: The 10-digit Google Ads customer ID (dashes optional). This is the account that gets queried/changed.
_fields.login_customer_id: The MCC (manager) account ID this account sits under. Required for agency setups so child-account queries don't fail with PERMISSION_DENIED. Omit for a standalone account.
_fields.currency: Account currency code (e.g. USD, EUR, PLN). Informational only — shown in --list-accounts.
_fields.timezone: IANA timezone (e.g. Europe/Warsaw). Used so --days date ranges are computed in the account's local time.
_fields.type: Free-form tag for your own grouping (e.g. client, internal). Not used by the connector.
_fields.default: true on exactly ONE account = the one used when you run a command WITHOUT --account/--customer. Optional; if no account is flagged default, you must always pass --account/--customer.
_fields.aliases: Extra short names you can use to select this account (--account=client-one). Optional.
